name: @aws-cbd/services
description: Trust services (issuer, verifier, STH publisher) for AWS Confidential-by-Design. This milestone: the libSQL storage layer with DB-enforced uniqueness invariants.

scripts.test: node --experimental-strip-types --disable-warning=ExperimentalWarning --test test/storage.test.ts test/issuer-service.test.ts test/verifier-service.test.ts test/sth-publisher.test.ts test/git-sth-target.test.ts
